description: ADT MUSIC v6.0.5 brings floating navbar (default off, can be enabled in appearance settings), album song listing can be disabled through appearance setting, ui to adt-decrypter, and other improvements. It also includes several bug fixes.

changelog.title: What's New
items: added floating navbar (default off, can be enabled in appearance settings)
added new album song listing can be disabled through appearance setting
added new update banner, thanks to Aldeic

changelog.title: Fixes & Improvements
items: fixed jio saavan random song playing
